description: Playbook routing evaluation cases. Each case verifies that a prompt routes to the correct playbook (or does not route to a forbidden one).

cases.prompt: Add a new REST API endpoint to the server with typed response and contract test.
Add a sequential SQL migration to create a new Postgres table with no numbering gaps.
Add a new HubChat tool definition and executor for a user action with prompt caching.
Fix the red CI job that is failing on the open pull request due to a lint error.
Ship a production release: tag the version, run the release checklist, and deploy.
Write a Playwright E2E smoke test for the onboarding flow using role selectors.
Change the Better Auth session cookie settings and account lifecycle for the new mobile flow.
Author a new SKILL.md file for the sergeant-analytics skill with correct frontmatter and lock hash.
Reconcile doc drift: find stale path references and archive completed planning docs.
Execute the next batch of planning tasks from docs/90-work/planning in parallel using fan-out agents.
Add a new REST API endpoint to the server with typed response and contract test.
Ship a production release for the web and server apps today.
